title: excoecaria rectinervis
intro: Excoecaria rectinervis, also known as the 'Gutta Percha Tree', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria rectinervis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often extracted and used in the form of a paste or tincture, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
